close_reason: Added impl From<wolfhsm::Error> for SecretError, replaced 4 map_err calls with ?
description: lib.rs:169-188 defines backend_err, join_err, poison_err — three mappers, all building SecretError::Backend { backend: BACKEND, source: ... }. Combined with the P0 finding that transient errors should map to Unavailable, the cleanest restructure is a classify(wolfhsm::Error) -> SecretError plus impl From<wolfhsm::Error> for SecretError so call sites use ? rather than .map_err(backend_err). Filing as separate idiom finding because the P0 will need to do this work and the function-vs-From shape is the idiom decision.
title: Three near-identical SecretError::Backend mapping closures; impl From<wolfhsm::Error> for SecretError would centralize
